pageContext.name: MS-07B Gouf Custom Ver. A.N.I.M.E
pageContext.description: Piloted by the ace who pledged fealty to the Zeon's Sahalin clan, Norris Packard, the legendary Gouf Custom joins the Ver A.N.I.M.E. series!  The menace of the 08th MS Team includes a full weapons loadout with a Gatling cannon, shield, and more for display in whatever configuration you like.  Don't miss your chance to add this Couf Custom figure to your Gundam collection!
